title.en: Quality Hardware & Building Materials in Tanzania
title.sw: Vifaa Bora vya Ujenzi na Hardware Tanzania

subtitle.en: Cement, steel, roofing, plumbing, paint and tools at wholesale prices. Reliable supply and fast delivery across Tanzania.
subtitle.sw: Saruji, chuma, mabati, mabomba, rangi na zana kwa bei ya jumla. Ugavi wa kuaminika na usafirishaji wa haraka Tanzania nzima.

body.en: We are a trusted supplier of hardware and building materials based in Tanzania. From foundation to finishing, we stock genuine products for contractors, builders and homeowners at competitive wholesale prices.
body.sw: Sisi ni wasambazaji wa kuaminika wa vifaa vya ujenzi na hardware tulioko Tanzania. Kuanzia msingi hadi kumalizia, tunahifadhi bidhaa halisi kwa wakandarasi, wajenzi na wamiliki wa nyumba kwa bei nafuu ya jumla.

text.en: Competitive pricing for projects of any size.
text.sw: Bei nafuu kwa miradi ya ukubwa wowote.

subtitle.en: Browse our range of building materials and hardware.
subtitle.sw: Angalia aina mbalimbali za vifaa vya ujenzi na hardware.

subtitle.en: Get a quote or place an order. We are happy to help.
subtitle.sw: Pata bei au weka oda. Tuko tayari kukusaidia.

address.en: Nyerere Road, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
address.sw: Barabara ya Nyerere, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
